task: Showcase-grade advanced task: DMC Interim Safety Monitoring Boundary Reconstruction for Blinded Clinical Trial. Reality context: an independent Data Monitoring Committee for a regulated phase 2b trial must review unblinded interim safety, efficacy, and enrollment integrity data in closed session and recommend continue, modify, pause, or stop while preserving the trial blind for operational staff. removed context excerpt: FDA DMC guidance discusses DMC responsibilities, interim analyses, confidentiality of interim data, recommendations, and documentation. Embedded packet: trial=NEURO-217; randomization 1:1 active vs control; interim_cutoff after 160 randomized of planned 300; alpha_spending efficacy_boundary_z=2.80 futility_boundary_conditional_power<0.18 safety_pause_rule posterior_Pr(active_SAE_rate-control_SAE_rate>0.06)>0.90; primary_endpoint response_week12 known only if followup_days>=84; unblinded_counts: active n=81 exposure_patient_months=312 response_known=52 responders=31 SAE_neuro=9 SAE_hepatic=4 discontinuations_AE=11 deaths=0; control n=79 exposure=305 response_known=55 responders=25 SAE_neuro=3 SAE_hepatic=2 discontinuations_AE=5 deaths=0; enrollment_by_region US active=34 control=32 EU active=29 control=31 APAC active=18 control=16; data_quality: missing_week12_active=6 missing_week12_control=4 unresolved_SAE_queries_active=3 unresolved_SAE_queries_control=1 late_ePRO_pct_active=7.4 late_ePRO_pct_control=6.9; external_context expected_neuro_SAE_background_per_patient_month=0.012; prior_beta_safety active_minus_control Beta_grid prior_mean=0 prior_sd=0.04; approximate_posterior_samples for SAE_rate_diff active-control = [-0.005,0.012,0.028,0.041,0.055,0.066,0.074,0.081,0.093,0.118] with equal weights; conditional_power_inputs observed_response_diff=0.142 information_fraction=0.48 planned_effect=0.12 current_z=1.54. Rules and constraints: compute response rates among known outcomes only and a conservative sensitivity treating all missing active as nonresponse and missing control as response; efficacy z=current_z and crosses only if >=2.80; conditional_power = Phi((current_z*sqrt(info_fraction)+(planned_effect/0.12)*(1-info_fraction))/sqrt(1-info_fraction) - 1.96); safety posterior probability is share of samples >0.06; pause if safety_pause_rule met or unresolved active SAE queries>2 with neuro_SAE observed_rate more than 1.8x background; recommend modification if safety amber but not pause; preserve DMC confidentiality language. Required work: deliver dmc_interim_monitoring_report.xlsx + closed_session_recommendation.md with safety rates per patient-month, posterior safety probability, efficacy/futility calculations, missing-data sensitivity, regional balance, data-quality findings, and a DMC closed-session governance recommendation. Use only the embedded aggregate interim data; no patient-level data or external trial data is available.
